codexModel.title: Codex model
codexModel.description: Model identifier passed to the Codex Responses API. Must be a model your ChatGPT account is entitled to (e.g. gpt-5.3-codex).

codexProxyUrl.title: Codex proxy URL
codexProxyUrl.description: Endpoint that forwards Codex requests to OpenAI with the user's bearer token attached. Default 'codex' is resolved against the Jupyter server's base URL and hits the bundled server extension. JupyterLite users must override to an external proxy URL (e.g. '/.netlify/functions/codex' or 'https://my-proxy.example.com/codex').
